AI Automation
Platform.

AxonQwen runs entirely on your own hardware. Browser automation, vision analysis, intelligent scraping — powered by Qwen3.5, with zero data leaving your machine. Built with Astro Static + Express.

What AxonQwen Does

Every Automation Tool You Need.

🌐

Browser RPA

Describe automation in plain English. Qwen3.5 vision reads the page and generates a complete Playwright script.

Playwright · Vision
🔍

Scraper Agent

Navigate any URL with real Chromium, extract structured JSON data from dynamic JS-rendered pages.

JSON · SPA · Pagination
🖼️

Vision Agent

Upload invoices, contracts, or any image. Qwen3.5 extracts all text, tables, and field values.

Multimodal · OCR
📡

Monitor Agent

Set intelligent URL watchers with natural language conditions. Alerts fire via WebSocket.

Cron · Alerts
⚡

Chat Agent

Streaming chat to your local Qwen3.5 model. Full history, custom prompts, and markdown rendering.

SSE · Markdown
📊

Reporter

Compile and summarise scraped data into professional reports in JSON or markdown.

Summarise · Format

Built-In Agents

Five Agents, One Platform.

01

Browser RPA Agent

Understands natural language and generates Playwright scripts. Combines vision with reasoning to navigate complex UIs.

Active
02

Scraper Agent

Loads any URL with real Chromium (handles JS-rendered SPAs), then uses Qwen3.5 to parse into clean JSON.

Active
03

Vision Agent

Send any image as base64. Qwen3.5 multimodal extracts all text, tables, and form fields — no external OCR.

Active
04

Monitor Agent

Schedule recurring URL checks with natural language trigger conditions. Alerts fire via WebSocket instantly.

Active
05

Chat Agent

Full streaming chat via Astro API route → Ollama. Persistent memory through OpenClaw. Optional Telegram/Slack.

Active

API Reference

Astro API Routes.
Zero Express.

All endpoints are Astro API route handlers — pure TypeScript, running on the same Node.js process as your pages. No separate Express server needed.

GET /api/health Server health + uptime
GET /api/ollama/status Ollama connection + model list
POST /api/chat Streaming chat completion (SSE)
GET /api/tasks List all tasks (newest first)
DELETE /api/tasks/[id] Delete a task record
POST /api/browser/run Browser RPA — Playwright task
POST /api/scraper/run Web scraping task
POST /api/vision/analyze Image analysis (base64)
POST /api/monitor/start Start URL monitor
GET /api/monitors List active monitors
DELETE /api/monitor/[id] Stop a monitor

WebSocket — ws://localhost:4321/_ws

const ws = new WebSocket('ws://localhost:4321/_ws');
ws.onmessage = ({ data }) => {
  const msg = JSON.parse(data);
  // msg.type: 'task_created' | 'task_updated' | 'task_result'
  //           'monitor_alert' | 'log' | 'connected'
};

Getting Started

Up & Running in 4 Steps.

AxonQwen membutuhkan Ollama sebagai AI engine lokal. Ikuti langkah berikut untuk memulai.

01

Install Ollama

Download dan install Ollama dari ollama.com. Tersedia untuk Windows, macOS, dan Linux.

# Windows (winget)
winget install Ollama.Ollama

# macOS (Homebrew)
brew install ollama

# Linux
curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh
02

Jalankan Ollama & Pull Model

Setelah install, jalankan Ollama lalu download model Qwen 3.5. Pastikan Ollama tetap berjalan di background.

# Jalankan Ollama server (biarkan terminal terbuka)
ollama serve

# Buka terminal baru, download model
ollama pull qwen3.5

# Verifikasi model terinstall
ollama list
03

Install Project Dependencies

Install npm packages dan browser Chromium untuk fitur Browser RPA dan Scraper.

# Install dependencies
npm install

# Install Chromium untuk Playwright
npx playwright install chromium
04

Jalankan AxonQwen

Start dev server. Dashboard akan tersedia di http://localhost:4321/app.

# Jalankan dev server
npm run dev

# Buka browser
# → http://localhost:4321      (Landing Page)
# → http://localhost:4321/app  (Dashboard)

! Troubleshooting

Q:

Chat menampilkan error "fetch failed"

Ollama tidak berjalan. Buka terminal dan jalankan ollama serve. Pastikan URL di file .env sesuai (default: http://localhost:11434).

Q:

Ollama berjalan tapi model tidak ditemukan

Pull model terlebih dahulu: ollama pull qwen3.5. Cek model tersedia dengan ollama list.

Q:

Dashboard kosong / "Server offline"

Pastikan dev server berjalan (npm run dev) dan akses melalui http://localhost:4321/app.

Q:

Browser RPA / Scraper error

Install Chromium browser: npx playwright install chromium.

Model Selection

Choose Your Qwen3.5 Model.

Model ID RAM Context
Qwen 3.5 7B qwen3.5:7b 8 GB 131K
Qwen 3.5 qwen3.5 10 GB 256K Recommended
Qwen 3.5 14B qwen3.5:14b 12 GB 256K
Qwen 3.5 27B qwen3.5:27b 20 GB 256K
Qwen 3.5 35B qwen3.5:35b 24 GB 256K
